metadata.description: zeroheight plugins for design system documentation quality. Currently ships the DSDS machine-readability audit.

plugins.name: zeroheight-audit-docs
plugins.description: Audit a zeroheight design system's docs for machine-readability against DSDS 0.12.0. Connects to your own zeroheight MCP instance and returns a prioritised, page-by-page list of authoring moves plus ready-to-paste segments.
